failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: fold-local session auction transition hazard rank over session auction events
failure_asset.next_boundary: R0003 blocks retrying session auction transition hazard or adverse-persistence weighting as a simple threshold, session, stop, target, hold, cost, monthly, or retry nudge; next work must decide whether C0012 still has a materially different R0004 or should close with fragile R0001 candidate evidence retained
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: proxy was deeply negative, MT5 tick aggregate net PnL was negative, and fold-isolated MT5 tick completed all nine folds with zero profitable folds and nine losing folds

supporting_lessons.summary: transition hazard replay lost every rolling-window OOS fold; total tick net PnL was -401.74 with zero profitable folds and worst fold rw_005 net PnL -67.84
tick execution was better than closed-bar logic by +132.07 total net PnL but both surfaces remained strongly negative, so divergence did not rescue candidate quality

catastrophic logic-parity schedules can deplete the 500 USD tester account before all scheduled entries execute; R0003 repaired logic parity by using a high-deposit closed-bar mechanical parity override while preserving the 500 USD baseline for tick execution evidence

hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: third C0012 true variant; learns fold-local session auction transition and adverse persistence hazards from train-only rolling windows, using event alignment, event persistence, opening-range migration, value-mid slope, and rotation acceleration rather than R0001 value rotation rank, R0002 robustness conditioning, or any threshold/session/stop/target/hold/cost/monthly retry

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: not a threshold, window, stop, target, hold, session, activity, cost-buffer, monthly, or retry nudge; it changes label, feature, model objective, and state surface while preserving schedule replay MT5 portability
pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: fold-local session auction transition hazard rank that scores event transition alignment, persistence, opening range migration, and adverse path persistence instead of retrying R0001 rotation rank or R0002 robustness conditioning

repair_records.repair_action: apply a logic-parity-only high-deposit tester account override in the R0003 wrapper so mechanical schedule replay is isolated from account depletion; keep tick execution on the runtime 500 USD baseline
repair_records.root_cause: initial closed-bar logic parity used the 500 USD runtime deposit and the catastrophic R0003 schedule depleted account capacity before all proxy schedule entries could execute
repair_records.validation_after_repair: logic parity rerun passed with trade_count_delta 0 and mismatch_count 0

feature.summary: session auction context plus transition features for event alignment, event persistence, value-mid slope, opening-range migration, rotation acceleration, and prior event pressure

label.summary: target-first auction transition resolution label that rewards fast favorable resolution and penalizes adverse-first path, adverse close pressure, spread pressure, and adverse persistence

model.summary: fold-local linear transition hazard ranker trained only on rolling train_is candidates with no selected model claim

trade_logic.summary: fixed-lot dual-direction schedule selected from transition hazard daily ranks with existing next-bar entry and fixed discovery stop-target-hold exits, then replayed in MT5
